title: 日本ダービーの後に・強くなれば

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her excellent running, Gold City makes her
mark in the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cheers erupt, celebrating the new Derby
champion, but for Gold City, the celebratory
mood is short-lived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her running is praised, but unsurprisingly
accompanied by comments about her beauty. She
doubts whether she'll ever manage to change her
reputation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But there is still the Kikuka Sho to look forward
to, a race where only the strongest prevail. She
readies herself for another attempt to change the
narrative surrounding her.
